27002.text: Selling 100% of food for margin crashed the meter to 240/720 twice — always lock a fixed survival buffer before touching any surplus, no exceptions for good prices.
Every extra round of reflecting past the first pass has moved the meter zero times — the file action itself is the only lever, so execute on sight, not on the fifteenth agreement with myself.
